config_template.call: ttnn.matmul(input_tensor_a, input_tensor_b, memory_config={MEM_CFG}, dtype={DTYPE}, program_config={PROGRAM_CONFIG}, compute_kernel_config={KERNEL_CONFIG}, core_grid=ttnn.CoreGrid(y={GRID_Y}, x={GRID_X}))
config_template.notes: program_config selects 1D/2D/DRAM-sharded variants; dram_matmul_config({M}, {K}, {N}, num_cores={NUM_CORES}) for decode-mode (M=1..32) width-sharded matmuls

weight_transform: identity (weight pre-converted to TILE_LAYOUT on device; dtype cast b -> a.dtype done by op)

placement_observations.source: llama/mistral MLP decode branch: w1_out = ttnn.matmul(x, self.w1, ..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_WIDTH_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode: M=32, K=14336, N=4096 (MLP w2 down-proj)
prefill: M=seq_len (chunked to 1024), N=hidden (attention dense wo)
placement_observations.source: mllama xattn dense: output reshaped to [1, seq_len//1024, 1024, -1] when seq_len > 1024, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention scores QK^T: [B*H, seq, seq], per-head sharded
placement_observations.source: BERT/SqueezeBERT/SentenceBERT attention: attention_scores = ttnn.matmul(query, key, memory_config=ttnn.L1_HEIGHT_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: SD cross-attn fused QKV projection, M=seq_len

memory_config.layout: INTERLEAVED if seq_len in {1024,4096} else BLOCK_SHARDED

placement_observations.source: stable-diffusion attention: interleaved_out = self.seq_len == 4096 or self.seq_len == 1024; memory_config = l1_interleaved if interleaved_out else block_sharded

placement_observations.size_descriptor: LM head: M=seq, K=hidden, N=vocab/num_devices (large N)
placement_observations.source: llama lm_head: lm_head_out = ttnn.matmul(norm_out_replicated, self.lm_head, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode QKV projection: M=32 (batch in tile), N=qkv_dim
placement_observations.source: gpt-oss decode: xqkv_fused = ttnn.matmul(hidden_states, weights.wqkv, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.L1_WIDTH_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG)
falcon helper: if seq_len > 1024: return ttnn.matmul(a, b, memory_config=output_mem_config, compute_kernel_config=get_default_hifi2_kernel_config()) (no core_grid/activation fusion on this path)
